sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65119" key="masouxa=s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μασουχᾶς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾶ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a compound remedy, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:7:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.37</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.23</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
